THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-30-2009 AT 1:30PM. MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-18-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF SABINE REYNAUD'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)
